1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural-born leaders, Aries are often bold and confident, which can make their signs stand out.
2. Taurus - 6/10 - Tauruses tend to be more laid-back and grounded, but they're not always as flashy or attention-grabbing as other signs.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Geminis are known for their quick wit and sharp tongues, which can make them stand out with ease.
4. Cancer - 5/10 - Cancers tend to be more introspective and emotional, so they might not always shine in a crowd.
5. Leo - 10/10 - Leos are natural performers who crave attention and adoration, making their signs hard to ignore.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Virgos are analytical and detail-oriented, which can make them stand out with unique insights or expertise.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Librans are charming and diplomatic, often using their charisma to get what they want.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Scorpios are intense and passionate, which can make their signs draw attention as they passionately pursue their interests.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Sagittarians are adventurous and optimistic, often sharing their enthusiasm with others.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Capricorns tend to be more reserved and serious, but they have a quiet confidence that can still draw attention.
11. Aquarius - 9/10 - Aquarians are humanitarian and forward-thinking, which can make them stand out as innovative thinkers or change-makers.
12. Pisces - 5/10 - Pisces are dreamy and empathetic, often more focused on connecting with others than seeking to be noticed themselves.
